name: Sand King
description: I will show you fear in a handful of sand… Crixalis, the Sand King The sands of the Scintillant Waste are alive and sentient — the whole vast desert speaks to itself, thinking thoughts only such a vastness can conceive. But when it needs to find a form to communicate with those of more limited scope, it frees a fragment of itself, and fills a carapace of magic armor formed by the cunning Djinn of Qaldin. This essential identity calls itself Crixalis, meaning 'Soul of the Sand,' but others know it as Sand King. Sand King takes the form of a huge arachnid, inspired by the Scintillant Waste's small but ubiquitous denizens; and this is a true outward expression of his ferocious nature. Guardian, warrior, ambassador — Sand King is all of these things, inseparable from the endless desert that gave him life.

abilities.name: Caustic Finale
abilities.description: An injection from Crixalis makes one brittle and as dry as the arid wastes, subject to implosive demise. Effect Radius: 400 (500). Base Damage: 20/40/60/80. Max Health as Damage Bonus: 3%/7%/11%/15%. Duration: 4.5/5/5.5/6.

abilities.name: Burrowstrike
abilities.description: Applies a Caustic Finale debuff of its corresponding level on all affected enemy units upon resurfacing. Cast Range: 525/600/675/750 (725/800/875/950). Spine Radius: 150. Damage: 80/150/220/290. Stun Duration: 1.2/1.4/1.6/1.8. Travel Distance: 525/600/675/750 (550/625/700/775). Cooldown: 14/13/12/11. Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Sand Storm
abilities.description: Creates a sandstorm that damages enemy units within the radius. The sandstorm immediately dissipates upon leaving the effect radius. Radius: 475/550/625/700. Damage per Second: 30/50/70/90 (55/75/95/115). Duration: 16/20/24/28. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Move Speed Slow: 35%. Cooldown: 40/34/28/22. Mana Cost: 85.

abilities.name: Stinger
abilities.description: Attacks and strikes an area with bonus spell damage. The strike additionally applies a movement speed slow to all enemy units within the radius. Deals additional damage to units within the proximity radius. Cast Range: 200. Effect Radius: 230/250/270/290. Instant Attack Factor: 1. Spell Damage Bonus: 50/75/100/125. Move Speed Slow: 10%/12%/14%/16% (22%/24%/26%/28%). Slow Duration: 4/5/6/7. Cooldown: 15/12/9/6. Mana Cost: 35/40/45/50.

abilities.name: Epicenter
abilities.description: Damage while Invisible Stuns leading to kills Base Radius: 500 (506). Number of Pulses: 12/16/20 (137/141/145). Damage per Pulse: 60/70/80 (70/80/90). Move Speed Slow: 30%/40%/50%. Attack Speed Slow: 50/55/60. Slow Duration: 3. Cooldown: 120/110/100. Mana Cost: 150/225/300.
